characters.appearance: Mid-20s, muscular build, tan complexion, short dark hair with a fade, and a neatly trimmed dark beard. He has expressive facial features and a friendly demeanor.
characters.wardrobe: A cream-colored, short-sleeve textured polo shirt and a thin gold necklace.

characters.appearance: A humanoid robot with a smooth white face, bright blue eyes, and visible mechanical joints at the neck. It has a highly symmetrical, artificial appearance.
characters.wardrobe: A traditional red and white checkered ghutra (keffiyeh) secured with a black agal.
characters.demeanor: Helpful, polite, and artificially expressive with robotic head movements.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: "I'm fine, thank you" बोलना बंद करो। [Stop saying "I'm fine, thank you".]
Character A says: I'm fine, thank you. [I'm fine, thank you.]
Character A says: I don't know. [I don't know.]
Character A says: You are welcome. [You are welcome.]
Character A says: मैं भी पहले ऐसे ही रटी-रटाई English बोलता था। [Even I used to speak this memorized English before.]
Character A says: जब तक मैंने Supernova के साथ practice शुरू नहीं की! [Until I started practicing with Supernova!]
Character A says: रुको, मैं दिखाता हूँ। [Wait, let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by calling out common, robotic English phrases.
- Establishes empathy by showing the presenter used to struggle with the same issue.
- Introduces the solution (Supernova) and transitions to a demo.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Confidence के साथ English बोलें! (Speak English with confidence!)
बोलना बंद करो (Stop saying)
"I'm fine, thank you".
I'm fine, thank you
I don't know
You are welcome
मैं भी पहले ऐसे ही रटी-रटाई English बोलता था। (Even I used to speak this memorized English before.)
जब तक मैंने practice शुरू नहीं की (Until I started practicing with)
Supernova!
रुको, मैं दिखाता हूँ। (Wait, let me show you.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: नमस्ते! [Hello!]
Character B says: क्या आप जानते हैं कि आप बिना डरे, confidence के साथ English बोल सकते हैं? [Did you know you can speak English with confidence, without fear?]
Character B says: कोई जादू नहीं, ये Supernova है। [No magic, this is Supernova.]
Character B says: एक ऐसा app जो बात करते-करते आपकी गलतियाँ सुधारता है, बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह। [An app that corrects your mistakes while talking, just like a friend.]
Character B says: चलिए, साथ में try करते हैं। [Come on, let's try it together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the AI tutor character directly to the audience.
- Sets realistic expectations (confidence over overnight fluency).
- Explains the core value proposition: real-time correction in a friendly, stress-free way.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
नमस्ते! (Hello!)
क्या आप जानते हैं (Did you know you can)
बिना डरे (without fear)
confidence के साथ (with confidence)
English बोल सकते हैं? (speak English?)
कोई जादू नहीं, (No magic,)
ये Supernova है। (this is Supernova.)
एक ऐसा app (An app)
जो बात करते-करते गलतियाँ सुधारता है (that corrects mistakes while talking)
बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह। (just like a friend.)
चलिए, (Come on,)
साथ में try करते हैं। (let's try it together.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: क्या आप English बोलते हैं? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: थोड़ी-थोड़ी। [A little bit.]
Character B says: आप कहाँ से हैं? Where are you from? [Where are you from? Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am India. [I am India.]
Character B says: आप करीब थे। सही तरीका है "I am from India." [You were close. The right way is "I am from India."]
Character A says: यार, मैं हमेशा इसमें confuse हो जाता हूँ। [Man, I always get confused in this.]
Character B says: इसीलिए तो मैं यहाँ हूँ, आपकी English सुधारने के लिए। [That's why I am here, to improve your English.]
Character A says: पर private tutors तो बहुत महँगे होते हैं। [But private tutors are very expensive.]
Character B says: Supernova के साथ आपको महँगी classes की ज़रूरत नहीं। [With Supernova, you don't need expensive classes.]
Character B says: ये बहुत affordable है और आप रोज़ practice कर सकते हैं। [It is very affordable and you can practice daily.]
Character B says: Interview हो या customer से बात करनी हो, सब सिखाएगा। [Whether it's an interview or talking to a customer, it will teach everything.]
Character A says: सच में? [Are you serious?]
Character B says: बिल्कुल। कोई रट्टा नहीं। [Absolutely. No rote learning.]
Character B says: बस AI tutor के साथ real-world English conversation की practice। [Just real-world English conversation practice with an AI tutor.]
Character A says: मतलब... एकदम असली teacher की तरह? [You mean... just like a real teacher?]
Character B says: हाँ, जो grammar और pronunciation सुधारे, ताकि आप confidence से बोलें। [Yes, who corrects grammar and pronunciation, so you speak with confidence.]
Character A says: सही है, फिर तो मैं Supernova अभी download करता हूँ। [That's great, then I'll download Supernova right now.]
Character B says: बहुत बढ़िया! चलिए साथ में English बोलते हैं। [Awesome! Let's speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's core loop: user speaks, makes a mistake, AI gently corrects.
- Addresses the cost objection by positioning Supernova as an affordable alternative to expensive private tutors (removing the competitor's 'free' claim).
- Highlights practical use cases (interviews, customers) and ends with a strong intent to download.

- Provides a clear, static end-card for the viewer to take action.
- Displays app store badges to build trust and show availability.
